full_prompt: Design the pressure-boundary shell and dished heads of a steam-methane reforming pre-reformer reactor vessel for a national collegiate chemical-plant design benchmark (blue-hydrogen plant), sized per ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 with CS acceptance by the 2023 Edition. The vessel is a vertical cylindrical shell with two ASME 2:1 semi-elliptical heads. Design basis per the chemical-plant design benchmark problem statement inheritance: nominal capacity 10 MMSCFD hydrogen plant, pre-reformer feed 450 C, design temperature 480 C, design pressure 2.8 MPa gauge (406 psig) with 10% overpressure margin to 3.08 MPa for relief, hydrogen service MDMT -29 C, contents: hydrocarbon-steam mixture, hydrogen partial pressure 0.8 MPa (requires NACE / API 941 Nelson-chart check but that is outside this CAD prompt). Geometry: inside diameter 1800 mm, straight-flange tangent-to-tangent length 4500 mm, 2:1 SE heads (crown radius 1620 mm, knuckle radius 306 mm), four N1 nozzles at 150 mm NPS (ANSI B16.5 Class 300 RF flanges) arranged at 0/90/180/270 degrees on the upper shell, one bottom drain N2 at 50 mm NPS, one top vent N3 at 25 mm NPS. Shell and heads must be a single monolithic welded assembly per UW-2(a) Cat. A/B/C welds fully radiographed (spot RT-2 allowed), but for this CAD prompt treat the vessel as one solid body with integral welds (no bolted shell-to-head joints). Material SA-516 Grade 70N (normalized) carbon steel; at 480 C design temp the ASME BPVC Section II Part D maximum allowable stress is 97 MPa (down from 138 MPa at room temp); density 7850 kg/m^3, Young's modulus 179 GPa at 480 C, Poisson's ratio 0.30. Corrosion allowance 3.0 mm. Joint efficiency E = 1.0 (full RT). Three load cases. Load Case 1 (design): 2.8 MPa gauge internal at 480 C plus vessel dead weight (filled with liquid water for hydrotest density 1000 kg/m^3 used for self-weight conservatism). Load Case 2 (hydrotest): 1.3x design = 3.64 MPa gauge internal at 30 C with full water fill per UG-99(b) 2017 edition (1.3 factor, previously 1.5). Load Case 3 (MDMT + vacuum excursion): -29 C metal temperature, internal pressure -14.7 psig (vacuum) per bellowsless refractory shrinkage event, external atmospheric 101 kPa. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 design conditions, shell thickness per UG-27 and head thickness per UG-32(d) must result in circumferential shell stress not exceeding the SA-516-70N allowable of 97 MPa at 480 C, including the 3.0 mm corrosion allowance; (R2) under LC2 hydrotest, primary membrane stress must not exceed 90% of yield per UG-99(c), i.e. 0.9 * 262 = 236 MPa at 30 C; (R3) a linear buckling eigenvalue analysis under LC3 external-pressure vacuum condition must yield a first-mode factor of at least 3.0 per UG-28 external pressure charts conservative interpretation; (R4) a steady-state thermal analysis with 480 C process side and ambient 20 C with 25 mm mineral-wool external insulation (k = 0.045 W/m-K) must show outer insulation jacket surface temperature below 60 C for personnel safety per ASME B31.3 industry practice; (R5) a modal analysis must place the first ovalizing mode above 25 Hz to avoid ground-level seismic excitation; (R6) the vessel total empty weight must not exceed 15000 kg to suit the module shipping envelope. Fluid and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design the pressure-boundary shell and 2:1 semi-elliptical heads of a vertical cylindrical steam-methane-reforming pre-reformer reactor vessel for a national collegiate chemical-plant (blue-hydrogen) design benchmark, per ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 (2023 Ed.), SA-516 Gr 70N material. Four 150 NPS N1 nozzles (ANSI B16.5 Class 300 RF) at 0/90/180/270 deg on the upper shell, one 50 NPS N2 bottom drain, one 25 NPS N3 top vent. Corrosion allowance 3.0 mm; joint efficiency E = 1.0 (full RT). ASME allowables: S_allow = 97 MPa at 480 C for SA-516-70N (Sec. II-D); hydrotest allowable 0.9 x yield_at_30C = 236 MPa per UG-99(c); external-collapse buckling SF 3.0 per UG-28 intent; first ovalizing mode >= 25 Hz; empty mass <= 15000 kg.

Envelope: 1800 mm ID x 4500 mm T-to-T cylindrical shell, 2:1 SE heads (crown 1620, knuckle 306 mm).

Load cases.
- LC1 design: 2.8 MPa g internal at 480 C (plus water-fill conservatism for self-weight) -- hoop/membrane stress <= S_allow.
- LC2 hydrotest: 3.64 MPa g (1.3 x design per UG-99(b) 2017 Ed.) at 30 C, full water fill.
- LC3 MDMT + vacuum: -29 C metal, internal at vacuum (101 kPa external).
- Plus steady-state thermal with 480 C process side, 20 C ambient and 25 mm mineral-wool external insulation (k = 0.045 W/m-K) -- outer jacket <= 60 C for personnel safety.

prompt.title: ASME VIII Div.1 pre-reformer vessel for collegiate blue-H2 plant benchmark
prompt.brief: Vertical SA-516-70N vessel, 1800 ID x 4500 T/T, 2:1 SE heads, 4x N1 150 NPS + N2 drain + N3 vent. 2.8 MPa @ 480 C design. MDMT -29 C.

properties.ASME_BPVC_reference: Section II Part D; Section VIII Div.1 UG-27/UG-32

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: ASME II-D S_allow SA-516-70N at 480 C

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: axisymmetric or shell with 3D at nozzles (second-order)

exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Process fluid dynamics handled in separate process simulation (HYSYS/Aspen).
exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Captured as part of insulation surface-temp thermal BC.

eval_coverage: ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 temperature-dependent allowable
